case_title: THOMAS LUNDBAEK VS. MILESTONE ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LUNDBAEK, THOMAS AS TO DEFENDANT MILESTONE ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUNDBAEK, THOMAS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MILESTONE ENTERTAINMENT GROUP, LLC A CALIFORNIA LLC $2,560.50 PRINCIPAL, $156.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,716.80, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
